title: Law applicable to control share voting rights
doc_html:
§136.  Repealed by Acts 2014, No. 328, §5, eff. Jan. 1, 2015.

Acts 1987, No. 62, §1, eff. June 11, 1987; Acts 2014, No. 328, §5, eff. Jan. 1, 2015.
